mapper.insert: insert into goods (g_no, gt_no, g_name, g_descript, g_barcode, g_unit, g_price, g_state, g_count, e_id, exhibit_time) values (#{goods.GNo},#{goods.gtNo},#{goods.GName},#{goods.GDescript}, #{goods.GBarcode},#{goods.GUnit},#{goods.GPrice},#{goods.GState}, #{goods.GCount},#{goods.EId},#{goods.exhibitTime});
mapper.delete:
delete from goods where g_no in
#{g_no}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM goods WHERE stock_warning_threshold IS NOT NULL AND g_count < stock_warning_threshold AND g_state = 1 ORDER BY g_count ASC
SELECT * FROM goods WHERE stock_reorder_point IS NOT NULL AND g_count < stock_reorder_point AND g_state = 1 ORDER BY g_count ASC
